100.description: Iseva ithole ama-header esicelo futhi iklayenti kufanele liqhubeke nokuthumela isidumbu sesicelo.

201.description: Isicelo siphumelele futhi kudalwe insiza entsha.

204.description: Iseva isiphrosese isicelo ngempumelelo kodwa ayibuyiseli okuqukethwe.

301.description: Insiza eceliwe inikezwe i-URI entsha yaphakade.

400.description: Iseva ayikwazi ukuphrosesa isicelo ngenxa yephutha leklayenti.

403.description: Iseva isiqondile isicelo kodwa yenaba ukusinika igunya.

429.description: Umsebenzisi uthumele izicelo eziningi kakhulu ngesikhathi esithile.

502.description: Iseva ithole impendulo engavumelekile iseva engenhla.

504.description: Iseva ayitholanga impendulo ngesikhathi iseva engenhla.
